text: Being here, I am enveloped by the clean lines and transparent walls, a sense of anticipation buzzing in the air. The acronym R+D—so boldly painted—evokes the spirit of human inquiry and collective striving. I hear the soft hum of electronics, distant footfalls, and a subdued, respectful quiet. I feel inspired and slightly awed, aware I inhabit a liminal space between knowledge created and possibilities yet to unfold.
